description: Missing, non-string, and path-separator token rejections plus the transfer GET path. Both languages now share Go's non-empty-string and path-safety texts.

cases.name: rejects a non-string token
cases.expect_error: token must be a non-empty string

cases.name: rejects a token with path separators
cases.expect_error: token must not contain path separators, query separators, or traversal segments

cases.name: gets an account service transfer by token
